steps.title: Step 1 — Identify the task
steps.content: Command-of-Evidence: pick the quotation that best illustrates the underlined claim — the sculptures LOOK as delicate as a breeze but are actually very DURABLE.

steps.title: Step 2 — Match the evidence
steps.content: The right quote must speak to physical durability while remaining consistent with the delicate look. Choice C says the materials are "both flexible and strong" — flexibility preserves the airy appearance, strength delivers the durability.

steps.title: Step 3 — Per-choice elimination
steps.content:
• Choice A — '3D model of the sculpture': describes a design tool; says nothing about how durable the finished sculpture is. ✗
  • Choice B — 'paper and pencil, and then a digital program': describes the design workflow; irrelevant to the appearance-vs.-durability contrast. ✗
  • Choice D — 'reflect local landmarks': speaks to artistic inspiration, not the strength of the materials. ✗
That matches choice C — C is correct.
